rawIntent: show how the AI agent places bets automatically

brief_interpretation.audience: crypto degens, DeFi users, sports bettors exploring onchain, web3 early adopters
inferredContext: AutoBett needs to demonstrate the core feature of AI agents autonomously placing bets
The audience is tech-savvy and responds well to crypto-native content with real utility
TikTok requires visually engaging content with a strong hook in the first few seconds
The value proposition centers around passive betting through AI automation

proposed_directions.title: Set & Forget Betting
proposed_directions.angle: Show the simplicity of setting your AI agent parameters and letting it work 24/7 without your intervention
proposed_directions.why_it_works: Highlights the passive income aspect that appeals to crypto degens and DeFi users who want exposure without constant monitoring
proposed_directions.emotional_driver: freedom from manual trading and constant screen time
proposed_directions.visual_style: split screen before/after, futuristic UI elements, betting action happening automatically
hook_examples: I haven't touched my betting positions in 7 days...
Your betting strategy shouldn't require your eyeballs glued to the screen 24/7

proposed_directions.title: Your Betting Agent Never Sleeps
proposed_directions.angle: Show the AI agent placing bets 24/7 while humans are occupied with other activities or sleeping
proposed_directions.why_it_works: Highlights the always-on advantage of AI which humans can't replicate, creating FOMO about missed opportunities
proposed_directions.emotional_driver: FOMO and desire for constant market exposure
proposed_directions.visual_style: time-lapse betting action, contrast between human activities and AI betting, notification avalanche
hook_examples: While you were sleeping, your AI agent was placing these bets...
The market never closes. Your betting shouldn't stop either.

proposed_directions.title: AI vs. Human Betting
proposed_directions.angle: Directly contrast manual betting processes with AI-powered automation to highlight the efficiency advantage
proposed_directions.why_it_works: Creates a clear before/after transformation that demonstrates the product's value proposition visually
proposed_directions.emotional_driver: superiority and efficiency of AI over manual processes
proposed_directions.visual_style: side-by-side comparison, speed of execution contrast, multiple simultaneous actions
hook_examples: Stop betting like it's 2021. This is how onchain degens win now.
Manual bettors are playing checkers while AutoBett users are playing chess.

creative_notes: use text overlays to reinforce key points
show actual betting positions being placed, not just UI
content_blueprint.editing_style: fast-paced cuts, dynamic transitions, text overlays, split screens
content_blueprint.pacing_guidance: hook within 2 seconds, new visual every 1.5-2 seconds, 15-20 seconds total
content_blueprint.on_screen_text_strategy: short, punchy text overlays that reinforce spoken elements

script: While you were sleeping, your AI agent was placing these bets...
Manual bettors miss 70% of market moves
Set your risk parameters. Let the AI handle the rest.
Position diversification without the manual work
shot_list: Person sleeping while phone notifications multiply
Split screen: frustrated manual bettor vs. active AI
AI agent visual placing bets across platforms
Close up of AutoBett interface with risk parameters
Network visualization of diverse betting positions
image_prompts: Dark bedroom scene with person sleeping, phone screen showing multiple crypto betting position notifications popping up, neon glow, cyberpunk aesthetic, with AutoBett brand colors #f0a500 and #1a1a2e, cinematic lighting

Split screen comparison showing frustrated person watching sports game versus flashing crypto betting opportunities timeline they're missing, high energy sports betting atmosphere, charts with up and down movements in brand colors #f0a500, #1a1a2e, and accent #e94560

Futuristic AI agent visualization placing bets across multiple sports, prediction markets, and onchain games simultaneously, neon interface elements in AutoBett brand colors #f0a500, #1a1a2e, #e94560, cyberpunk crypto aesthetic

Clean, futuristic interface showing AutoBett dashboard with risk parameter settings and automated betting workflow, simplified UI elements in brand colors #f0a500 (primary), #1a1a2e (secondary), and #16213e (surface)

Visualization of multiple diverse betting positions across sports, prediction markets, and onchain games all being managed by AutoBett AI agent, shown as connected nodes in a network with glowing lines, using brand colors #f0a500, #1a1a2e, and accent #e94560
slide_plan: Hook: Sleeping person with multiplying betting notifications
Solution: AutoBett AI agents never sleep
How it works: Setting risk parameters
caption_options: While you're scrolling TikTok, AutoBett's AI agents are placing bets 24/7 across sports, prediction markets, and onchain games. Set your risk parameters once and let the AI handle the rest. Stop missing opportunities while you sleep. #ConnectWallet
Manual bettors are asleep at the wheel while the market keeps moving. AutoBett's AI agents work 24/7 so you never miss an opportunity. Set your parameters once and let the AI do the work.
render_prompts: Render as dynamic 15-second TikTok video with fast cuts, text overlays, and crypto-native aesthetic
Add subtle motion to all graphics to maintain engagement
voiceover_version: While you were sleeping, your AI agent was placing these bets...
Manual bettors miss 70% of market moves
Set your risk parameters. Let the AI handle the rest.
Position diversification without the manual work

storyboard.copy: While you were sleeping, your AI agent was placing these bets...
storyboard.image_prompt: Dark bedroom scene with person sleeping, phone screen showing multiple crypto betting position notifications popping up, neon glow, cyberpunk aesthetic, with AutoBett brand colors #f0a500 and #1a1a2e, cinematic lighting, high contrast
storyboard.visual_notes: Start with a strong visual contrast between the peaceful sleeper and the chaotic, active betting notifications. Create instant FOMO.

storyboard.copy: Manual bettors miss 70% of market moves
storyboard.image_prompt: Split screen comparison showing frustrated person watching sports game versus flashing crypto betting opportunities timeline they're missing, high energy sports betting atmosphere, charts with up and down movements in brand colors #f0a500, #1a1a2e, and accent #e94560
storyboard.visual_notes: The frustration should be palpable. Use fast cuts and dynamic chart movements to show the opportunities being missed.

storyboard.image_prompt: Futuristic AI agent visualization placing bets across multiple sports, prediction markets, and onchain games simultaneously, neon interface elements in AutoBett brand colors #f0a500, #1a1a2e, #e94560, cyberpunk crypto aesthetic, holographic elements
storyboard.visual_notes: Show the AI in action across multiple markets simultaneously. The visual should feel futuristic and technologically advanced.

storyboard.copy: Set your risk parameters. Let the AI handle the rest.
storyboard.image_prompt: Clean, futuristic interface showing AutoBett dashboard with risk parameter settings and automated betting workflow, simplified UI elements in brand colors #f0a500 (primary), #1a1a2e (secondary), and #16213e (surface), glowing buttons and sliders
storyboard.visual_notes: Focus on the simplicity of the interface. Make it look approachable yet sophisticated. The settings should look intuitive.

storyboard.copy: Position diversification without the manual work
storyboard.image_prompt: Visualization of multiple diverse betting positions across sports, prediction markets, and onchain games all being managed by AutoBett AI agent, shown as connected nodes in a network with glowing lines, using brand colors #f0a500, #1a1a2e, and accent #e94560
storyboard.visual_notes: The network visualization should clearly show the diversification advantage. The connections should pulse with energy to indicate activity.
Clean, bold CTA with primary brand color #f0a500 on a dark #1a1a2e background. Minimal design to emphasize action. Add wallet connection icon for clarity.

creativePlan.caption: While you're scrolling TikTok, AutoBett's AI agents are placing bets 24/7 across sports, prediction markets, and onchain games. Set your risk parameters once and let the AI handle the rest. Stop missing opportunities while you sleep. #ConnectWallet

variants.label: faster paced
variants.difference: Quicker cuts and more dynamic transitions

variants.label: more technical
variants.difference: Deeper dive into the betting mechanism

review_flags: Ensure the AI betting mechanism is clearly demonstrated, not just mentioned
Avoid making the AI look like magic - ground it in the smart contract technology
Check that all visuals maintain crypto-native aesthetic rather than generic tech look
